mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_member ( company_id, login_id, password_hash, name, role, owner_slot, password_status, temp_password_expires_at, active, created_by ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{loginId}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{role}, #{ownerSlot}, #{passwordStatus}, #{tempPasswordExpiresAt}, #{active}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select:
SELECT member_id, name AS member_name, login_id, role, password_status, active, updated_at FROM tb_member
ORDER BY updated_at DESC, member_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'ADMIN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS admin_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN role = 'STAFF' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS staff_count FROM tb_member
SELECT member_id, name AS member_name, login_id, role, password_status, active, updated_at FROM tb_member WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_member SET name = #{memberName}, role = #{role}, owner_slot = NULL, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND member_id = #{memberId}

UPDATE tb_member SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, password_status = 'TEMPORARY', temp_password_expires_at = #{expiresAt}, password_changed_at = NULL, login_failed_count = 0, locked_until_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.company_id, c.company_code, m.member_id, m.login_id, m.password_hash, m.name, m.role, m.password_status, m.active FROM tb_member m JOIN tb_company c ON c.company_id = m.company_id WHERE m.company_id = #{companyId} AND m.member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_member SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, password_status = 'ACTIVE', temp_password_expires_at = NULL, password_changed_at = NOW(6), login_failed_count = 0, locked_until_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
